ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a reference to the affiliation of Victor Parisiensis to the Sereni Academy in Naples see Tobia R. Toscano, Dalla Senna al Sebeto: Simon De Vallambert, medico umanista, "Socio" dell`Accademia dei Sereni di Napoli in Les Académies Dans L`Europe Humaniste Idéaux et pratiques, Genève, Librairie Droz S.A., 2008, pp. 197-209, (Bl shelfmark:WE.A.31/441)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
